title: pyrola rotundifolia subsp. dahurica
intro: Pyrola rotundifolia subsp. dahurica, also known as Dahurian wintergreen or Asian wintergreen, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dahurian wintergreen include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are used to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the respiratory and nervous systems.
